description.en: Calculate the collection ID from parent collection, condition ID, and index set using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.de: Berechne die Collection-ID aus Parent-Collection, Condition-ID und Index-Set über das Conditional Token Framework.
description.es: Calculate the collection ID from parent collection, condition ID, and index set using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.fr: Calculate the collection ID from parent collection, condition ID, and index set using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.ro: Calculate the collection ID from parent collection, condition ID, and index set using the Conditional Token Framework.
description.it: Calculate the collection ID from parent collection, condition ID, and index set using the Conditional Token Framework.

actions.abi: function getCollectionId(bytes32 parentCollectionId, bytes32 conditionId, uint256 indexSet) external pure returns (bytes32)

description.en: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.es: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.fr: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.ro: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).
description.it: The parent collection ID (bytes32 hex string, often 0x0).

description.en: The condition ID (bytes32 hex string) of the market.
description.es: The condition ID (bytes32 hex string) of the market.
description.fr: The condition ID (bytes32 hex string) of the market.
description.ro: The condition ID (bytes32 hex string) of the market.
description.it: The condition ID (bytes32 hex string) of the market.

description.en: The index set (uint256) for the outcome (e.g., 1 for YES, 2 for NO).
description.de: Das Index-Set (uint256) für das Ergebnis (z.B. 1 für YES, 2 für NO).
description.es: The index set (uint256) for the outcome (e.g., 1 for YES, 2 for NO).
description.fr: The index set (uint256) for the outcome (e.g., 1 for YES, 2 for NO).
